sections.paragraph: προσδοϰάω [πρός, cp. δοϰεύω and δοϰάζω in sense of ‘watch, notice’] ‘be on the alert for’, w. contexts indicating affective aspects, which are reflected in such renderings as expect, wait for, look for Mt 11:3; Lk 1:21; 8:40; Ac 10:24; 2 Pt 3:12-14; for some passages expect fits esp. well Mt 24:50; Lk 12:46; Ac 3:5; 28:6; be in suspense appears to apply well 27:33.
